name: @intentsolutionsio/accessibility-test-scanner
description: A11y compliance testing with WCAG 2.1/2.2 validation, screen reader compatibility, and automated accessibility audits

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install accessibility-test-scanner\\n  or /plugin install accessibility-test-scanner@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
